title: [Nyessem, Gardens East]
description: The centerpiece of this room is a blue-green Nyessemian tree set with a rune-etched diamond.  A series of gem-inlaid stone lanterns hang from the tree's branches.  Behind the tree, a tall white stone fountain pours its water down from the ceiling into twin water-filled gutters, which flow alongside some stone display cases and the tree.  A lush flower garden draped from the walls covers three of the room's walls, thick with twining vines and blooms at every height.  A preserved arbor-lined opening leads out.
